response.objective_caption: Close-up abstract image of a mushroom gill structure, showing radiating orange-red lamellae with fine parallel ridges. A bright white edge curves along the top left corner, transitioning into pale pink and deep reddish-orange tones toward the bottom right. The gills fan out in elegant curved rows against a dark brown to black background. Fine striations and subtle color gradients run lengthwise along each gill surface.
